author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو حفص عمر بن أحمد بن عثمان بن أحمد بن محمد بن أيوب بن أزداذ البغدادي المعروف بـ ابن شاهين
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and compiler from Baghdad, known for his extensive collections and transmissions.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the broader tradition of hadith compilation in the Islamic intellectual heritage.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contributes to the corpus of hadith literature, reflecting the scholarly activities of the 4th century AH.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Hisham bin Muhammad is known for careful editing and attention to detail in hadith texts.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: Likely involved manuscript collation and chain of narration verification.
